title: Multi-Stage Builds
content:
### Why Multi-Stage?

Multi-stage builds use multiple `FROM` statements in one Dockerfile to create separate stages. This separates build-time dependencies from the runtime environment, producing smaller and more secure images.

### Basic Pattern

```dockerfile
# Stage 1: Build
FROM golang:1.20 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN go build -o myapp

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM alpine:3.18
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates
COPY --from=builder /app/myapp /usr/local/bin/myapp
CMD ["myapp"]
```

The final image is based on `alpine` (5MB), not `golang:1.20` (800MB+).

### Multiple FROM Statements

Each `FROM` starts a new stage. Previous stages are available with `--from=`:

```dockerfile
FROM node:18 AS deps
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json .
RUN npm ci --only=production

FROM node:18 AS build
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
```

### --target for Specific Stages

Build only a specific stage:

```bash
docker build --target build -t my-app:build .
docker build --target deps -t my-app:deps .
```

This is useful for debugging or extracting intermediate artifacts.

### Reducing Image Size

| Technique | Impact |
|---|---|
| Multi-stage | Remove build tools from final image |
| Distroless base images | ~5MB images with only runtime |
| Alpine Linux | ~5MB base vs ~150MB Debian |
| Layer optimization | Combine RUN commands, clean up in same layer |

### Distroless Images

Google's [distroless](https://github.com/GoogleContainerTools/distroless) images contain only your application and its runtime dependencies — no shell, package manager, or other tools:

```dockerfile
FROM golang:1.20 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN go build -o myapp

FROM gcr.io/distroless/base
COPY --from=builder /app/myapp /myapp
CMD ["/myapp"]
```

This significantly reduces the attack surface.
codeExample:
FROM golang:1.20 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o server

FROM alpine:3.18
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates
COPY --from=builder /app/server /server
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/server"]

quiz.question: What is the main benefit of multi-stage builds?
Which flag builds only a specific stage in a multi-stage Dockerfile?
